runs.text: Addressable Demand | US-built and flagged oceangoing commercial vessels and high-volume offshore vessels meet desired regulatory and/or serial production requirements.

text_body.plain_text: Addressable Demand | US-built and flagged oceangoing commercial vessels and high-volume offshore vessels meet desired regulatory and/or serial production requirements.

runs.text: Provides Jones Act protection or enables subsidy eligibility under pending legislation and potential expansion of other programs; required for certain export/import provisions

text_body.plain_text: Provides Jones Act protection or enables subsidy eligibility under pending legislation and potential expansion of other programs; required for certain export/import provisions

runs.text: Drives national shipbuilding capacity with avg. gross tonnage 15x+ that of offshore vessels

text_body.plain_text: Drives national shipbuilding capacity with avg. gross tonnage 15x+ that of offshore vessels

runs.text: Meets capabilities and tonnage required for participation in subsidized programs; priced to achieve revenue targets

text_body.plain_text: Meets capabilities and tonnage required for participation in subsidized programs; priced to achieve revenue targets

runs.text: Small fleet size precludes serial production; low gross tonnage per vessel limits national security utility and pricing

text_body.plain_text: Small fleet size precludes serial production; low gross tonnage per vessel limits national security utility and pricing

runs.text: Unlikely to drive meaningful demand given small fleet size (~37 vessels) and low retirement rates

text_body.plain_text: Unlikely to drive meaningful demand given small fleet size (~37 vessels) and low retirement rates

runs.text: Large fleet size enables serial production (5+ hulls/yr to achieve max labor efficiencies); viable if owner/operators conduct 1-for-1 replacement of expected retirements

text_body.plain_text: Large fleet size enables serial production (5+ hulls/yr to achieve max labor efficiencies); viable if owner/operators conduct 1-for-1 replacement of expected retirements
